Lab Technician

Reliable lab support, precision, and safety.

Services

  • Sample preparation and processing
  • Equipment calibration and maintenance
  • Data recording and quality control

Contact

© 2025 Lab Technician

Lab Technician Landing Page

A minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. The page is responsive, uses a red/black/white color scheme, includes a hero with title and subtitle, a brief services list, and a contact form that shows an alert on submit (no backend).

Getting started
- Install dependencies: npm install
- Run tests: npm test
- Open the site: open the index.html file in your browser (double-click or use a simple static server)

Project structure
- index.html — Single-page site
- styles.css — Styles (red, black, white only)
- script.js — Contact form handler (shows an alert)
- __tests__/index.test.js — Basic Jest test for hero title

Notes
- No backend is included; the form submission is intercepted by JavaScript and shows an alert.

notes: Run npm install to install Jest, then npm test to execute the test.
Open index.html directly in a browser to view the landing page.
